title: hieracium subcaesium
intro: Hieracium subcaesium is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus, known for its yellow flowers and edible leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Consuming Hieracium subcaesium may provide various health benefits, such as aiding digestion, reducing fever, and supporting immune function. The leaves and flowers of the plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
